violations.claim: Dry-run branch contains no issueExists() call. Duplicate titles in issues[]
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: P5
; LINE: 139
; Dry-run branch contains no issueExists() call. Duplicate titles in issues[]
; are all printed, but real mode would skip them. The preview is misleading.
(declare-const total_issues Int)
(declare-const duplicate_count Int)
(declare-const dry_run_printed Int)
(declare-const real_mode_filed Int)
; Transition: dry-run prints every issue unconditionally — filed = total_issues
(assert (>= duplicate_count 1))
(assert (>= total_issues duplicate_count))
(assert (= dry_run_printed total_issues))
; Transition: real mode calls issueExists() and skips duplicates
(assert (= real_mode_filed (- total_issues duplicate_count)))
; Violation: dry-run and real-mode diverge when duplicates exist
(assert (not (= dry_run_printed real_mode_filed)))
(check-sat)
; sat → total=3, dupes=1: dry-run prints 3, real mode files only 2

(assert (= dry_run_printed total_issues))
; Transition: real mode calls issueExists() and skips duplicates
(assert (= real_mode_filed (- total_issues duplicate_count)))
; Violation: dry-run and real-mode diverge when duplicates exist
(assert (not (= dry_run_printed real_mode_filed)))
